Transportation by Bus

You can reach Istanbul Health and Technology University Sütlüce Campus by using the following bus lines and getting off at the University stop.

36T Cebeci-Taksim

41ST Seyrantepe- Topkapı

47N Nur Sitesi- Eminönü
